items.title: Final: Mercury 86, Sparks 82. Los Angeles had a shot to tie in the final 20 seconds but Dearica Hamby’s layup rolled unkindly off the rim. The Sparks have lost 5 in a row. They’re 10-16. Alyssa Thomas had 19 points, 15 assists, 11 rebounds for Phoenix. And now the All-Star break.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Mercury 86, Sparks 82. Los Angeles had a shot to tie in the final 20 seconds but Dearica Hamby’s layup rolled unkindly off the rim. The Sparks have lost 5 in a row. They’re 10-16. Alyssa Thomas had 19 points, 15 assists, 11 rebounds for Phoenix. And now the All-Star break.
